title: carya × dunbarii
intro: Carya × dunbarii, also known as Dunbar's hickory or Dunbar's walnut, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between the shellbark hickory (Carya laciniosa) and the bitternut hickory (Carya cordiformis). The medicinal properties of Carya × dunbarii are attributed to its bark, which contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carya × dunbarii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Carya × dunbarii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, but its use should be guided by a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions with medications.
